top_signals.title: BHP Workers to Strike at World’s Top Iron Ore Export Port
top_signals.summary: Workers at BHP Group’s Port Hedland iron ore terminal in Western Australia will stage an eight-hour strike on July 16, unions said, escalating tensions with the mining giant and putting some supply at risk.
